rules.description: Change set touches an unusually large number of files.
rules.message: Change set exceeds 50 files; request additional review.
Protected path touched; requires human override to proceed.

rules.description: Secret scanner flagged one or more findings.
rules.message: Potential secrets detected; resolve before proceeding.

rules.description: Push targets a protected branch directly.
rules.message: Direct push to protected branch is not allowed; use a PR.

rules.description: No test files touched in a code change.
rules.message: No tests modified; confirm coverage is adequate.
